generated_doNotEdit.title: Go Home Behavior
generated_doNotEdit.description: Allows the mob to move back to the position they were spawned.

fields.title: Calculate New Path Radius
fields.description: Distance in blocks that the mob is considered close enough to the end of the current path. A new path will then be calculated to continue toward home.

fields.title: Goal Radius
fields.description: Distance in blocks within the mob considers it has reached the goal. This is the "wiggle room" to stop the AI from bouncing back and forth trying to reach a specific spot.

fields.title: Interval
fields.description: A random value to determine when to randomly move somewhere. This has a 1/interval chance to choose this goal.

fields.title: Failed
fields.description: Event(s) to run when this goal fails.

fields.title: Home
fields.description: Event(s) to run when this mob gets home.

fields.title: Speed Multiplier
fields.description: Movement speed multiplier of the mob when using this AI Goal.

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.
